message:
Use sync_all for durable alpha investing state persistence and fix CVaR VaR tracking

- Replace flush() with sync_all() in AlphaInvestingStore::save to
  ensure state file data reaches persistent storage before the atomic
  rename, preventing data loss if the system crashes between flush and
  rename
- Fix discrete CVaR VaR computation to continuously update VaR as we
  walk the sorted tail, so VaR reflects the boundary of the worst-case
  tail rather than only the first loss value encountered

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
